channel.title: autocomplete on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in autocomplete on ilo

item.title: CLI Autocomplete
item.description: The ilo generate-completion command generates autocompletion configuration for shells such as bash and zsh. In order to get autocomplete working in your shell, execute the following snippet: $ source <(ilo generate-completion) See the integration pages for various shells for details. Once enabled you can use the <TAB> key to autocomplete ilo commands and their options: # autocomplete commands $ ilo s<TAB> $ ilo shell # autocomplete options $ ilo shell --p<TAB> $ ilo shell --pull
